sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85345" key="polu/splagxnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-σπλαγχνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85345.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of great mercy,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Jac.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
